title: Bash chokepoint hook: destructive-git / --no-verify sentinel, gate-command pipe-masking, release/push hold (FEAT-013 pillar 1 + 4)
description: PreToolUse(Bash) chokepoint (segment-split on ;&| so chained commands are caught): block git --no-verify and destructive git ops (reset --hard, rebase, push --force, tag -d, unmerged branch-delete) without a per-invocation user-granted sentinel; block gate commands (npm test / run check / run build) piped or truncated (exit-code masking); block npm run release:*, npm publish, and non-durably-authorized git push without a user-minted hold-release grant object. Escapes are user-attributed per the provenance-ceremony shape (same-turn re-issue forbidden). FEAT-013 R2, R3, R4.
acceptance_criteria: git --no-verify and each destructive git op are blocked without the user sentinel; a granted sentinel passes; a routine non-destructive git op passes.
npm test|run check|run build piped or tailed is blocked; the bare command passes; a set -o pipefail form is permitted.
npm run release:*, npm publish, and non-authorized git push are blocked without a user-minted grant object; a covered grant passes.
Regression cells for each true-positive block and each legitimate pass.
